case_title: CATRON, LINDA vs. TURNER, JET et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CO-COUNSEL QUILAN S. TOM APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF LINDA CATRON WHO WAS ALSO PRESENT WITH PROPERTY MANAGER, MONIKA HARRISON. DEFT. JET TURNER WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. PRO TEM JUDGE, RONALD ARLAS. REPORTER, SHERRY SAWYER. D. CARTER, CLERK. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT WITH A STAY AND PAY PROVISION. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER, JET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 22ND STREET #27, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,745.25 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,745.25, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JUDGMNT OF $2745.25 INCLUDES ATNYS FEES & COSTS. IF DFT PAYS $1000 TO PLTF BY 5PM 5-23-97, ANY WRIT WILL BE WITHDRAWN BY PLTF, PROVIDED DEFT ALSO PAYS $500/MO STARTING 6-3-97 UNTIL JUDGMNT PAID. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ALL TERMS & CONDITIONS.
